world.title: If China does that, Trump warns Beijing over possible Iran arms shipment
world.description: President Donald Trump warned China would face “big problems” if it sends weapons to Iran, after US intelligence suggested Beijing may secretly route air defence systems through third countries. China denied the allegation, calling it baseless. The report adds to tensions despite a fragile US-Iran ceasefire and Trump’s upcoming China visit.
